titles.text: The Three Stooges: Digitally Remastered Edition

descriptions.text: The Three Stooges: Digitally Remastered Edition is a "Remastered" version of the classic Cinemaware game The Three Stooges with new graphics and sound, ported to 32-bit Windows while retaining the original gameplay.

You play the three dudes Moe, Curly and Larry who want to save an old woman's orphanage from the evil banker who wants to take it away. They need to get $5000 in the next 30 days or the orphanage is gone. To achieve that aim, they can do diverse activities - like prizefighting, participating in a radio quiz, serving pies or eating oysters.
